query: SELECT id, quotationNumber, versionNumber, baseQuotationId, parentQuotationId, status FROM quotations WHERE quotationNumber LIKE '%v2-V3%' OR quotationNumber LIKE '%-V3%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
